testsuite.name: com.telogaspar.catbreed.breedList.data.api.BreedApiIntegrationTest

testcase.name: GIVEN live api WHEN getBreeds is called THEN prints breed names for manual inspection
GIVEN live api WHEN getBreeds is called THEN each breed has an id and name
GIVEN live api WHEN getBreeds is called THEN returns a non-empty list

testsuite.system-out: === Breeds from API === • Abyssinian (Egypt) — Active, Energetic, Independent, Intelligent, Gentle • Aegean (Greece) — Affectionate, Social, Intelligent, Playful, Active • American Bobtail (United States) — Intelligent, Interactive, Lively, Playful, Sensitive • American Curl (United States) — Affectionate, Curious, Intelligent, Interactive, Lively, Playful, Social • American Shorthair (United States) — Active, Curious, Easy Going, Playful, Calm • American Wirehair (United States) — Affectionate, Curious, Gentle, Intelligent, Interactive, Lively, Loyal, Playful, Sensible, Social • Arabian Mau (United Arab Emirates) — Affectionate, Agile, Curious, Independent, Playful, Loyal • Australian Mist (Australia) — Lively, Social, Fun-loving, Relaxed, Affectionate • Balinese (United States) — Affectionate, Intelligent, Playful • Bambino (United States) — Affectionate, Lively, Friendly, Intelligent === Total: 10 ===
